{{Quote|I killed Beda's husband and Eremay's father, and condemned ''them'' to a life in exile. Naturally they want me dead.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]|<ref name="Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen">''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''</ref>}}
'''Beda Ies''' was the wife of [[Daxar Ies]] and the mother of [[Eremay Ies]].

==Biography==
After her husband was targeted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was dispatched to assassinate him for stealing from the Empire. While searching through Dexar's desk for a list of bank accounts in which he had placed two billion [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] funds into, Jade was interrupted by the Ies family. Shooting Dexar dead, she told Beda and Eremay to disappear forever, where they eventually became [[Joiner]]s. [[Raynar Thul|UnuThul]] would later inform Jade and her husband [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], that the Ies' fear of discovery led to the corruption of the [[Gorog]] nest on [[Woteba]], unknowingly creating the Dark Nest. Known as '''BedaGorog''' UnuThul believed that Skywalker had killed her on [[Kr]]. It was than that the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] discovered the tale to be false, because it was [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Welk]] who died on Skywalker's blade.
